view.title: Validate explicit UC need #7

blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the visibility of the date of last inspection.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the visibility of the date of last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the date of the last inspection is visible on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the presence of this information on the QR code or equipment tag. The only related evidence pertains to the inspection status of a specific forklift, which does not address the broader requirement for visibility of the inspection date.
gaps: No evidence confirming the visibility of the date of last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code.

deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the visibility of the date of last inspection.
